title: alysicarpus heyneanus var. ludens
intro: Alysicarpus heyneanus var. ludens, also known as the "Pilku", is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Fabaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia and Africa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin ailments due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Alysicarpus heyneanus var. ludens include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and powders, and is also used in the form of oils and ointments for topical application.
